docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $749.00 FILED BY BOSIA, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOSIA, LISA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-17-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSIA, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY $749.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $780.50, AS REFUND ON RETURNED RING PURCHASED FROM DEFENDANT. RING WAS DAMAGED AT SALE AND FURTHER DAMAGED WHEN REPAIRED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,002.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-20-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BOSIA, LISA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSIA, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT GRACE JEWELRY
